description: Apply Dagster AutomationConditions broadly via selection rules with fall-through priority. Six derive strategies (most_frequent / least_frequent / tiered / staggered / any_dep_updated / all_deps_updated), preset shortcuts, explicit cron, Python escape hatch. Three modifiers (label / business_hours_only / min_interval_minutes). Per-asset settings preserved by default; topological cadence propagation through chains.

preserve_existing.label: Preserve Existing
preserve_existing.description: If true (default), assets with their own automation_condition are NOT overwritten. Like CSS !important on per-asset settings.

ignore_selection.description: Passed to on_cron().ignore() — deps not included in the freshness check.

allow_selection.description: Passed to on_cron().allow() — only these deps participate in freshness check.

preset.description: Name of any zero-arg AutomationCondition factory: 'eager' / 'on_missing' / 'any_downstream_conditions' / etc.

derive_from_upstreams.description: Auto-derive condition from each matching asset's upstream cron schedules.

offset_minutes.description: Required for strategy='staggered'. Positive only; cross-day-boundary rejected.

python.description: Universal escape hatch — 'module.path:function_name' returning an AutomationCondition. The function takes zero args or one arg (asset spec).

label.description: Override the auto-generated condition label (for UI clarity).

business_hours_only.description: Constrain the resulting cron to business hours/days. Refuses for tiered and no-cron strategies.

business_days.description: Cron day-of-week syntax, default '1-5'. e.g. '1-6' (Mon-Sat), '*' (every day), '0,6' (weekends).

min_interval_minutes.description: Floor the derived cron to a minimum period (debounce fast upstreams).

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Ordered list — first selection-match wins (fall-through). Each rule needs `selection` + one of `cron` / `preset` / `derive_from_upstreams` / `python`. Optional modifiers: `label`, `business_hours_only`, `min_interval_minutes`.

name: Automation Condition Applicator
